title: Crypto PAC backed by Anchorage and Chainlink announces endorsements for 2026 midterms

title: Chance of new Bitcoin lows ‘extremely slim’ as long-term holders’ supply tops 15M BTC
summary: Data suggest Bitcoin’s chance of dropping below $60,000 again is slim to none, thanks to longer-term investors holding more than 71% of the asset’s total supply.

title: Lone Star Weighs Sale of Lender IKB After Nearly 20 Years
summary: Buyout firm Lone Star Funds is in the early stages of exploring a sale of IKB Deutsche Industriebank AG nearly two decades after investing in the German lender, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
